blended.narrative: Hogadon is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,906 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 48°F, winds around 21 mph.
Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 18".
